Title: Columbia Men's M Fkt Ii Windbreaker Jacket Descripion: ["Ultra light and weather-repelling, this protective and packable windbreaker is a must for running in wet, blustery weather. \u2028\u2028 You will be comfortably shielded in this stain and water resistant windbreaker. It's the perfect lightweight layer and first line of defense to combat chilly winds and light drizzle. Its full length zippered front allows you to dial in the protection on the fly, while a zip-closed security pocket keeps essentials close by. Sleeves with elastic at the cuffs and thumbholes keep hands and arms comfortable, while elastic at the hem and reflective detail adds a touch of safety. This coat can pack down into its own pocket for easy travel. Columbia offers this jacket in multiple colors and sizes. Active Fit. To ensure the size you choose is right, utilize our sizing chart and the following measurement instructions: For the sleeves, start at the center back of your neck and measure across the shoulder and down to the sleeve. If you come up with a partial number, round up to the next even number. For the chest, measure at the fullest part of the chest, under the armpits and over the shoulder blades, keeping the tape measure firm and level."]
